mapper.select: SELECT id, student_id, course_id, chapter_id, video_id, start_time, end_time, duration, video_progress, last_position, created_time FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} AND video_id = #{videoId} ORDER BY created_time DESC LIMIT 1

SELECT id, student_id, course_id, chapter_id, video_id, start_time, end_time, duration, video_progress, last_position, created_time FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} ORDER BY created_time DESC, id DESC

SELECT lr.id, lr.student_id, lr.course_id, lr.chapter_id, lr.video_id, lr.start_time, lr.end_time, lr.duration, lr.video_progress, lr.last_position, lr.created_time FROM learning_record lr INNER JOIN ( SELECT video_id, MAX(id) AS max_id FROM learning_record WHERE student_id = #{studentId} AND course_id = #{courseId} GROUP BY video_id ) latest ON lr.id = latest.max_id ORDER BY lr.created_time DESC, lr.id DESC
